name: Women's Shiny Plastic Square Sunglasses - Universal Thread™ Tortoise Brown: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Create a shiny, sunny day look with the Shiny Plastic Square Sunglasses from Universal Thread™. These square sunglasses feature a tortoise shell-print brown frame with gray lenses for a fashion-forward look. The lenses have a UV protection feature to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. These tortoise shell-print sunglasses fit narrow faces and are made of a 100% recycled plastic frame for a lightweight feel.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
